EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriRasterError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

The raster related error codes.

[Guid("6B026E3C-7525-11D3-B99A-00C04FA30154")]
public enum esriRasterError

Fields

E_ESIRGRID_FAILED_TOO_LONG = -2147188688

-2147188688: The Grid path and name is longer than 129

E_FAILED_TO_OPEN_RASTER_ITEM = -2147188685

-2147188685: Failed to open a raster item in a mosaic dataset.

E_INPUT_RASTER_VIOLATES_OUTPUT_RASTER_ORIGIN = -2147188611

-2147188611: The extent of the input raster dataset must be to the right and below the origin of the output raster dataset.

E_INVALID_RASTER_COMMAND = -2147188687

-2147188687: It's an invalid raster command.

E_MISSING_RASTER = -2147188686

-2147188686: Missing a raster (becoming a constant) in a mosaic dataset.

E_RASTER_ACCESS_IS_DENIED = -2147188729

-2147188729: The user does not have permission to execute the operation.

E_RASTER_ADD_DIMENSION_FAILED = -2147188658

-2147188658: Failed to add dimension

E_RASTER_ALTITUDE_TOO_LOW = -2147188607

-2147188607: The altitude is too low.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_COPY_FAILED = -2147188651

-2147188651: Failed to append slices. Unable to copy the slices to the the destination raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_ERROR_DIMENSIONS_MISMATCH = -2147188654

-2147188654: Failed to append slices. The second raster should have exact same dimensions as first raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_ERROR_DIMENSION_VALUES = -2147188653

-2147188653: Failed to append slices. The second raster should have dimension values after the dimesnion values of the first raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_ERROR_PROPS_MISMATCH = -2147188656

-2147188656: Failed to append slices. The second raster should have exactly same extent, cellsize and SRS as first raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_DIMENSION = -2147188605

-2147188605: Failed to append slices due to an unsupported dimension.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_ERROR_VARIABLES_MISMATCH = -2147188655

-2147188655: Failed to append slices. The second raster should have exact same variables as first raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_SLICES_NO_SLICES_APPENDED = -2147188652

-2147188652: No slices appended.

E_RASTER_APPEND_VARIABLES_COPY_FAILED = -2147188593

-2147188593: Failed to append variables. Unable to copy the variables to the the destination raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_VARIABLES_ERROR_PROPS_MISMATCH = -2147188639

-2147188639: Failed to append variables. The source raster should have exactly same extent, cellsize and SRS as destination raster.

E_RASTER_APPEND_VARIABLES_NO_VARIABLES_APPENDED = -2147188638

-2147188638: No variables appended.

E_RASTER_BLOCKSIZE_TOO_LARGE = -2147188693

-2147188693: The requested pixel block size is too large.

E_RASTER_BUILD_TRANSPOSE_FAILED = -2147188600

-2147188600: Failed to build multidimensional transpose.

E_RASTER_BUILD_TRANSPOSE_FAILED_SINGLE_SLICE = -2147188627

-2147188627: Failed to build transpose on a single slice.

E_RASTER_BUNDLEFILE_NOTEXIST = -2147188670

-2147188670: The requested bundle file doesn't exist.

E_RASTER_CAMERA_MODEL_MISMATCH = -2147188610

-2147188610: The camera make or model does not match.

E_RASTER_CANNT_ALTER_VAT = -2147188718

-2147188718: Can't alter raster attribute table for multiband raster dataset.

E_RASTER_CANNT_BUILD_VAT = -2147188719

-2147188719: Can't build raster attribute table for multiband raster dataset.

E_RASTER_CANT_FIND_FORMAT_FUNCTION = -2147188701

-2147188701: Can't find the format registration function.

E_RASTER_CANT_LOAD_FORMAT_DLL = -2147188702

-2147188702: Can't load a format DLL.

E_RASTER_CANT_MOSAIC_COLORMAPED = -2147188703

-2147188703: Can't mosaic a dataset with a colormap.

E_RASTER_CELL_VALUE_ILLEGAL_FOR_RAT = -2147188619

-2147188619: A cell value exceeds the range that can be stored in the value field of the raster attribute table.

E_RASTER_CLOUD_FILE_NOT_FOUND = -2147188618

-2147188618: Cloud storage file could not be found.

E_RASTER_CLOUD_FOLDER_ACCESS_DENIED = -2147188632

-2147188632: Access denied to the cloud folder.

E_RASTER_CLOUD_OAUTH_NOTSIGNEDIN = -2147188606

-2147188606: OAuth user is not signed in.

E_RASTER_COLORCORRECTION_NOT_LICENSED = -2147188691

-2147188691: Color correction is not supported with the current license.

E_RASTER_DATASET_EXIST = -2147188728

-2147188728: Raster file(table for SDE) already exist.

E_RASTER_DATA_STORE_ACCESS_DENIED = -2147188603

-2147188603: Access denied to a raster store.

E_RASTER_DBASE_RAT_TOO_LARGE = -2147188644

-2147188644: tif raster attribute table (dBase format) is too large

E_RASTER_DELETE_TRANSPOSE_FAILED = -2147188631

-2147188631: Failed to delete transpose.

E_RASTER_DIMENSION_AS_VARIABLE_ERROR = -2147188657

-2147188657: Failed to remove multidimensional variable.

E_RASTER_EMPTY_ECD_FILE = -2147188612

-2147188612: ECD file is empty.

E_RASTER_EMPTY_ESL_FILE = -2147188592

-2147188592: ESL file is empty.

E_RASTER_EMPTY_EXTENT = -2147188614

-2147188614: The raster dataset has an empty extent.

E_RASTER_EMPTY_WORKSPACE = -2147188724

-2147188724: No raster datasets in the workspace.

E_RASTER_EXCEEDS_MAX_BLOCK_SIZE = -2147188668

-2147188668: The pixel block exceeds the maximum size allowed.

E_RASTER_EXCEEDS_MAX_DIMENSION_SIZE = -2147188604

-2147188604: The row or column dimension exceeds the maximum size allowed.

E_RASTER_EXPLAINABILITY_MAP_DATA_ERROR = -2147188596

-2147188596: The object classification model did not provide the expected explainability map information.

E_RASTER_FAILED_CLOUD_CONNECTION = -2147188667

-2147188667: Failed to connect to the cloud data source.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_ALTER_GEODATAXFORM = -2147188708

-2147188708: Failed to delete raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_ALTER_HISTOGRAM = -2147188714

-2147188714: Failed to alter histogram.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_ALTER_STATS = -2147188715

-2147188715: Failed to alter statistics.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_BUILD_PYRAMID = -2147188707

-2147188707: Failed to build pyramid.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_CALC_HISTOGRAM = -2147188716

-2147188716: Failed to compute histogram.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_CALC_STATS = -2147188717

-2147188717: Failed to compute statistics.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_COPY_DATASET = -2147188711

-2147188711: Failed to copy raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_CREATE_CATALOG_ITEM = -2147188723

-2147188723: Failed to create a new raster catalog item.

-2147188713: Failed to create raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_CREATE_RASTER_CURSOR = -2147188683

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_DELETE_ATTRIBUTE_TABLE = -2147188683

-2147188683: Failed to delete attribute table.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_DELETE_DATASET = -2147188709

-2147188709: Failed to delete raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_DELETE_PYRAMID_LEVEL = -2147188616

-2147188616: Failed to delete the pyramid level file.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_EXECUTE_COMMAND = -2147188676

-2147188676: Failed to execute a command.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_OPEN_CATALOG = -2147188721

-2147188721: Failed to open a raster catalog.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_OPEN_CONNECTION = -2147188726

-2147188726: Failed to open a GeoDatabase connection.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_OPEN_DATASET = -2147188712

-2147188712: Failed to open raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_OPEN_WORKSPACE = -2147188725

-2147188725: Failed to open a raster workspace.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_READ_BLOCK = -2147188682

-2147188682: Failed to read a pixel block.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_REGISTER_FORMAT = -2147188700

-2147188700: Failed to register a new raster format.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_RENAME_DATASET = -2147188710

-2147188710: Failed to rename raster dataset.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_RENAME_PYRAMID_LEVEL = -2147188615

-2147188615: Failed to rename the pyramid level file.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_WRITE_AUX = -2147188697

-2147188697: Failed to write binary AUX file.

E_RASTER_FAILED_TO_WRITE_BLOCK = -2147188681

-2147188681: Failed to write a pixel block.

E_RASTER_FAILURE_ACQUIRE_LOCK = -2147188665

-2147188665: Failed to acquire GDAL dataset lock.

E_RASTER_FILE_ALREADY_EXISTS = -2147188666

-2147188666: File already exists and overwriting is not allowed.

E_RASTER_FILE_FAILED_TO_COPY = -2147188731

-2147188731: Failed to copy the specified file.

E_RASTER_FILE_FAILED_TO_RENAME = -2147188732

-2147188732: Failed to rename the specified file.

E_RASTER_FILE_INVALID_EXTENSION = -2147188734

-2147188734: Raster file extension is invalid.

E_RASTER_FILE_LZW_FAILED = -2147188730

-2147188730: Raster file with LZW compression failed to open.

E_RASTER_FILE_NOT_FOUND = -2147188735

-2147188735: Raster file cannot be found.

E_RASTER_FOCAL_LENGTH_MISMATCH = -2147188608

-2147188608: The focal length does not match.

E_RASTER_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_ENDEAVOUR = -2147188623

-2147188623: only crf output is currently supported for distributed raster operations in endeavour.

E_RASTER_IMAGE_SIZE_MISMATCH = -2147188609

-2147188609: The image size does not match.

E_RASTER_INCOMPLETE_RESULT = -2147188648

-2147188648: Incomplete result (finished with error(s)).

E_RASTER_INPUT_NOT_MULTIDIMENSIONAL = -2147188660

-2147188660: The Raster is not a multidimensional raster.

E_RASTER_INVALID_CELLSIZE = -2147188699

-2147188699: Invalid cell size.

E_RASTER_INVALID_FOR_JPEG_COMPRESSION = -2147188594

-2147188594: Invalid raster for JPEG compression.

E_RASTER_INVALID_PROCESSING_SERVER = -2147188675

-2147188675: Invalid Image Processing Server (Can't connect).

E_RASTER_INVALID_RASTER_VALUE = -2147188722

-2147188722: Invalid raster value.

E_RASTER_IN_LOAD_ONLY = -2147188689

-2147188689: Catalog geometry column is already in Load Only IO mode.

E_RASTER_JOB_TIMED_OUT = -2147188662

-2147188662: Parallel processing job timed out.

E_RASTER_LOST_CONNECTION = -2147188669

-2147188669: The connection with the server has been lost.

E_RASTER_MAKEDIR_FAILED = -2147188634

-2147188634: Failed to sync objects from/to local/cloud.

E_RASTER_MISSING_CAMERA_LOCATION = -2147188680

-2147188680: Missing frame camera location.

E_RASTER_MISSING_FOCAL_LENGTH = -2147188672

-2147188672: Missing focal length.

E_RASTER_MISSING_IMAGE_SIZE = -2147188674

-2147188674: Missing image size.

E_RASTER_MISSING_PIXEL_SIZE = -2147188673

-2147188673: Missing pixel size.

E_RASTER_MISSING_VARIABLE_DIMENSION_FIELDS = -2147188649

-2147188649: Missing variable field name or dimension field names.

E_RASTER_MOSAIC_NOT_LICENSED = -2147188690

-2147188690: Mosaic dataset is not supported with the current license.

E_RASTER_NOT_ENOUGH_LINKS = -2147188684

-2147188684: Not enough links for fitting a polynomial transform.

E_RASTER_NO_COMMON_DIMENSION = -2147188664

-2147188664: No common dimension or no matching variable between 2 multidimensional rasters.

E_RASTER_NO_FAILED_BUNDLES = -2147188647

-2147188647: No failed bundles.

E_RASTER_NO_FEATUREPOINTS = -2147188678

-2147188678: Can't find any feature points.

E_RASTER_NO_MATCHING_VARIABLE = -2147188663

-2147188663: No matching variable between 2 multidimensional rasters.

E_RASTER_NO_MATCHPOINTS = -2147188679

-2147188679: Can't find any match points.

E_RASTER_NO_RASTER_STORE = -2147188677

-2147188677: No raster store.

E_RASTER_NO_WRITE_PERMISSION = -2147188695

-2147188695: No write permission.

E_RASTER_OPERATION_CANCELED = -2147188698

-2147188698: Operation canceled.

E_RASTER_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED_ON_REMOTE_DATASET = -2147188598

-2147188598: The operation cannot be completed on a remote raster dataset.

E_RASTER_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED_ON_SUBDATASET = -2147188597

-2147188597: The operation cannot be completed on a subdataset.

E_RASTER_REFINED_LEE_INCORRECT_FILTER_SIZE = -2147188617

-2147188617: Refined Lee filter only supports filter size of 7*7.

E_RASTER_REMOVE_DIMENSION_FAILED = -2147188636

-2147188636: Failed to remove dimension.

E_RASTER_REMOVE_DIMENSION_FAILED_NO_OF_DIM_VALUES = -2147188613

-2147188613: Failed to remove dimension.

E_RASTER_REMOVE_DIMENSION_FAILED_SLICES = -2147188637

-2147188637: Failed to remove dimension. The input raster has more than 1 slice.

E_RASTER_REMOVE_SLICES_FAILED = -2147188595

-2147188595: Failed to remove slice(s).

E_RASTER_RENDERER_INVALID_BAND_INDEX = -2147188733

-2147188733: Specified band index is invalid.

E_RASTER_REPLACE_SLICES_COPY_FAILED = -2147188640

-2147188640: Failed to replace slices. Unable to copy the slices to the the destination raster.

E_RASTER_REPLACE_SLICES_ERROR_DIMENSIONS_MISMATCH = -2147188642

-2147188642: Failed to replace slices. The source raster should have exact same dimensions as destination raster.

-2147188643: Failed to replace slices. The source raster should have exact same variables as destination raster.

E_RASTER_REPLACE_SLICES_NO_SLICES_REPLACED = -2147188641

-2147188641: No slices replaced.

-2147188645: Failed to set variable attributes

-2147188692: Too many unique directories to list.

E_RASTER_TOO_MANY_FAILED_BUNDLES = -2147188646

-2147188646: Too many failed bundles.

-2147188602: Too many nested raster functions.

E_RASTER_TOO_MANY_UNIQUE_VALUES = -2147188705

-2147188705: Too many unique values.

E_RASTER_TOO_SMALL_TO_BUILD_PYRAMIDS = -2147188624

-2147188624: The dimension of the dataset is smaller than 1024 x 1024, pyramids will not be built.

-2147188599: Failed to truncate dimension values - truncation modifies the number of dimension values.

E_RASTER_UNKNOWN_ERROR = -2147188736

-2147188736: Unknown error.

E_RASTER_UNKNOWN_PIXELTYPE = -2147188696

-2147188696: Unknown pixel type.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT = -2147188706

-2147188706: Unsupported raster format in Raster Core.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_GT = -2147188630

-2147188630: Unsupported geographic datum transformation.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_HV = -2147188628

-2147188628: Unsupported horizontal-vertical datum transformation.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_PCS = -2147188720

-2147188720: Unsupported projected coordinate system (PCS).

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_PIXEL_TYPE = -2147188704

-2147188704: Unsupported/unknown Pixel Type.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_VT = -2147188629

-2147188629: Unsupported vertical datum transformation.

E_RASTER_UNSUPPORTED_XT = -2147188601

-2147188601: Neither a horizontal nor vertical datum transformations is supported.

-2147188659: Failed to remove multidimensional variable.

-2147188694: The VAT count value exceeds 2 Billion.

-2147188626: Get Metadata operation has failed.

-2147188625: Set Metadata operation has failed.

-2147188620: failure in endeavour worker.
